title: IVR Confirmation Task
description: Order Core to IVR v1 task contract for official order confirmation.
$comment: Source: Phase 8 IVR-04. Order Core owns task creation and all order state transitions.

order_version.description: Order state/concurrency version used for callback revalidation.

customer_id.description: Customer id used for trust/eligibility resolution.

trusted_customer_decision.description: Trust decision from Order Core policy.

official_contact_id.description: Official contact selected by Order Core.

phone_ref.description: Reference to official phone; raw phone storage should be minimized.

phone_masked.description: Masked official phone for admin/evidence display.

phone_validation_status.description: Phone validation status at task creation.

blocked_reasons.description: Blocking reasons if task is not callable.

no_direct_order_update.description: Invariant: IVR task does not authorize direct order mutation.

not_for_quote_cart_draft.description: Invariant: Quote, Cart, and Order Draft must not create IVR tasks.
